title: cxxrtl: -O1 optimisation unbuffers wires too permissively

features.name: task called from always_ff block
features.description: Code should include a task that is called from an always_ff procedural block

features.name: non-blocking assignment with xor operator
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment using the XOR operator with a counter variable

features.name: integer variable updated in always_ff via task
features.description: Code should include an integer variable that is incremented via a task call within an always_ff block
features.snippet:
int counter;
task incr(); counter++; endtask
initial begin counter = 0; end
always_ff @(posedge clk) begin incr(); end
